executive_summary: CEEFM Kft has 12+ years of operation and 200+ completed projects, but its website is a React single-page app that renders an empty div for search engine crawlers. There are no case studies, no blog, no Hungarian-language content, and no lead capture mechanisms. The site has one indexable URL while competitors have 15-40. Rebuilding the site with server-side rendering, creating case studies, and launching Hungarian content could generate 2-5M HUF/month in new contract value within 6 months.

findings.finding:
SPA renders empty div to crawlers. The HTML body is just
. No SSR or SSG configured. Search engines and AI crawlers see a blank page.
Single indexable URL. The entire site is one page with JavaScript scrollTo() navigation. Zero anchor tags exist. No crawlable internal links anywhere.
No lead capture mechanism. No contact form prominence, no quote request, no chat widget, no email capture, no WhatsApp. Every visitor is a lost lead.
No Hungarian-language content despite operating in Hungary for 12 years. The primary local market cannot engage in their own language.
Zero case studies from 200+ completed projects. The single biggest trust failure. Competitors with 20 projects and two case studies will outperform CEEFM in pitches.
No sitemap.xml, no robots.txt. Standard crawl infrastructure is completely absent.
14 service categories reduced to 6 cleaning-focused services on the website. Three-country operations shown as Hungary-only. Massive capability gap between reality and web presence.
No team page or leadership visibility. Facility management is a people business. Anonymous companies lose to companies with visible teams.
Sustainability tagline ('Where Sustainability Meets Success') with zero supporting evidence. No ESG reporting, no green certifications, no sustainability metrics displayed.
All images hotlinked from Unsplash and cdn.abacus.ai. No self-hosted images. Single point of failure if CDNs change URLs.

quick_wins: Add robots.txt and sitemap.xml to /public/ directory. Takes 15 minutes. Signals a maintained site to crawlers.
Fix Open Graph image 404. Upload a proper og-image.jpg (1200x630px) to /public/. Affects every social media share.
Add address, geo coordinates, and openingHours to LocalBusiness schema. Critical for local search pack visibility.
Add FAQPage schema markup to existing FAQ section. Data already exists in React code, just needs structured data wrapper.
Add click-to-call tel: links on all phone number displays. One-tap calling for mobile visitors.
medium_term: Rebuild site with SSR/SSG (Next.js, Astro, or static HTML). Create 15+ individual pages for services, industries, about, contact. This is the foundation for all other improvements.
Create 5 case studies from best hotel, apartment, student housing, commercial, and multi-property projects. Document scope, challenge, solution, measurable results.
Launch all content in Hungarian and English. Target 'letesitmenykezeles Budapest' and related Hungarian search terms. Doubles addressable search audience.
Build a quote request form on every page. Fields: Name, Company, Email, Phone, Property Type, Service Needed. Minimum viable lead capture.
Create industry-specific landing pages for Hotels, Apartment Complexes, Student Housing, and Office Buildings with segment-specific pain points and CTAs.
strategic: Launch content marketing program: 2-4 blog posts per month in Hungarian and English. Topics: seasonal maintenance guides, energy saving tips, compliance checklists. Target 500+ monthly organic visitors within 6 months.
Optimize Google Business Profile. Add photos, services, posts. Actively collect Google reviews from existing satisfied clients. Fastest path to local search visibility.
Package integrated FM as the lead offer. Stop selling 14 separate services. Lead with 'Integrated Facility Management' as a single monthly contract. Price at premium. Cross-sell from there.
Build client retention system with quarterly business reviews, annual renewals, and a client portal for maintenance requests and reporting.
